title: OpenTeams Role Definition
description: Schema for roles/<name>.yaml — an optional per-role definition file that provides capabilities, display metadata, and extension fields.

name.description: Role name. Must match the filename (roles/<name>.yaml) and appear in the team manifest's roles list.

extends.description: Parent role to inherit capabilities from. When used with capability composition (add/remove), the base capabilities come from the parent role.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name. Defaults to the role name if omitted.

description.description: Human-readable description of the role's purpose. Defaults to 'Role: <name>' if omitted.

oneOf.description: A flat list of capability strings. Replaces any inherited capabilities entirely.

capabilities.description: Capabilities for this role. Either a flat list (full replacement), a composition object with add/remove operations on the parent role's capabilities, or a map from capability tokens to config objects.

capabilities_add.description: Capabilities to add to the parent role's set. Alternative flat syntax for CapabilityComposition. Only valid when 'extends' is set. Mutually exclusive with CapabilityComposition inside 'capabilities'.

capabilities_remove.description: Capabilities to remove from the parent role's set. Alternative flat syntax for CapabilityComposition. Only valid when 'extends' is set. Mutually exclusive with CapabilityComposition inside 'capabilities'.

prompt.description: Path to a prompt file, relative to the template directory. Lower priority than topology node prompts.

prompts.description: Ordered list of prompt files relative to prompts/<role>/. The first file becomes the primary prompt; the rest are additional sections.

macro_agent.description: Extension fields for the macro-agent system. Stored but not interpreted by openteams.

additionalProperties.description: Extension fields for other systems. Stored but not interpreted by openteams.

CapabilityComposition.description: Compose capabilities relative to a parent role (requires 'extends'). Add capabilities not in the parent, and/or remove capabilities the parent has.

add.description: Capabilities to add on top of the parent role's capabilities.

remove.description: Capabilities to remove from the parent role's capabilities.

CapabilityMap.description: Map form for capabilities: keys are dot-namespaced capability tokens, values are config objects (or null for no config). Replaces any inherited capabilities entirely.
